summary: Tested BioCloud attendance sync and Payroll run P0 bug fixes. Both backend APIs and frontend pages are working correctly. BioCloud sync successfully fetches 50 attendance records from external ZK BioCloud system. Payroll run properly handles duplicate month validation by checking hr_payroll_batches collection instead of hr_payroll.
passed_tests: GET /api/hr/biocloud/status - Returns connected=True with employee mapping stats (5 mapped, 101 unmapped)
POST /api/hr/biocloud/fetch-attendance - Successfully fetches 50 attendance records from BioCloud
GET /api/hr/payroll/batches - Returns 3 payroll batches with correct structure
POST /api/hr/payroll/run - Properly rejects duplicate month (Feb 2026 already paid)
POST /api/hr/payroll/run - Returns proper error message 'already processed' instead of duplicate key error
PUT /api/hr/payroll/batch/{id}/approve - HR approval workflow works correctly
PUT /api/hr/payroll/batch/{id}/approve - Invalid approval sequence properly rejected
Frontend /hr/payroll - Run Payroll button visible with data-testid='run-payroll-btn'
Frontend /hr/payroll - Modal opens with month/year/department selectors
Frontend /hr/biocloud - Page loads with BioCloud Status showing 'Connected'
Frontend /hr/biocloud - Shows 106 BioCloud employees, 5 mapped, 101 unmapped
Frontend /hr/biocloud - Employee Mapping tab displays BioCloud employees with Map buttons
Frontend /hr/biocloud - Attendance Sync tab displays date picker and Fetch Attendance button
Frontend /hr/biocloud - Fetch Attendance completes successfully (via backend logs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BioCloud sync and Payroll features are fully functional. BioCloud connects to https://56.biocloud.me:8085 using Playwright to scrape attendance data. Currently 5 employees are mapped between BioCloud and CLT Synapse. Payroll batches exist for 2026-02 (paid), 2026-03 (hr_approved), 2026-04 (hr_approved). The duplicate key error fix was verified - now properly checks hr_payroll_batches collection.

biocloud_sync_fix.description: Playwright scraping successfully navigates to Attendance > Daily Attendance and parses layui table
biocloud_sync_fix.test_output: Fetched 50 records, synced 1 to CLT Synapse (49 unmapped employees skipped)

payroll_duplicate_fix.description: Now queries hr_payroll_batches instead of hr_payroll to check for existing batches
